reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: More evidence is required before this result can be used for compliance or high-consequence action.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Evidence sufficiency gate did not pass.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Attach or review required evidence, then rerun preflight.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Display as blocked or review-required; do not label compliance-ready.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: This result is based on stale current-state materialization.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Materialization freshness gate reported stale basis.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Refresh materialization or qualify as stale.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show stale badge and block high-consequence use if stale is blocking.

reasonCodes.safeUserMessage: Some information exists but cannot be shown under your current authority.
reasonCodes.developerMeaning: Result includes redacted fields due to authority or data-sovereignty policy.
reasonCodes.requiredRemediation: Request appropriate authority or continue with qualified result.
reasonCodes.safeUiBehavior: Show a permission-limited badge and explain that restricted information exists under current authority.
